positive: A stylized, high-contrast graphic illustration of a majestic mountain range meeting a calm body of water at sunset. The mountains should have sharp, jagged peaks, rendered in deep indigo and ultramarine tones, contrasting sharply with the warm, golden orange and lavender gradients of the sky and water reflections. The overall composition should be symmetrical, featuring a prominent, centrally located peak silhouette. Use a clean, linework art style mixed with subtle watercolor washes for depth. Focus on bold, wearable prints suitable for screen printing on clothing, with clear separation of color planes and strong graphic impact. Minimal, elegant lettering space reserved at the bottom center.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, writing, noisy, grainy, ugly, lowres, artifact, oversaturated, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, muted colors, photorealism, photograph, illustration style deviation
